text: B5= RDS - Multi AZ - Instance @ s © s ¢ Data => Primary AND Replicated to StandBy = Committed (Synchronous) e Not free tier ... extra cost for replica ¢ ONE StandBy replica ONLY ¢ .. which can't be used for reads or writes ® 60-120 seconds failover e Same region only ... different AZs in the same region ¢ Backups taken from standby to improve performance ¢ AZ Outage, Primary Failure, Manual failover, Instance type change and software patching
